# Data reference type

**Data field**

The data reference type.

## Overview

A value of `'alis'` indicates a file system alias record. A value of `'url '` indicates a string containing a uniform resource locator. Note that the fourth character in `'url '` is an ASCII blank (`0x20`).

## Data fields

- **Size**: The number of bytes in this data reference atom.
- **Type**: The type of this atom.
- **Flags**: A 32-bit integer containing flags.
- **Data reference size**: The size of the data reference in bytes, expressed as a 32-bit integer.
- **Data reference**: A data reference to a QuickTime movie, or to a stream or file that QuickTime can play.
